title: KillEffect
description: This is the ORIGINAL Plugin of Wrath SMP S4, I wanted to let everyone use it since it's quite a good working plugin
body:
# KillEffect

Required resource pack at [https://github.com/cometcake575/KillStrength/raw/main/KillStrength.zip](https://github.com/cometcake575/KillStrength/raw/main/KillStrength.zip) (add to your server.properties)

**KillEffect** is a unique plugin, where you choose from six effects: Strength, Speed, Hero Of The Village, Haste, Regeneration and Jump Boost. 
  
Whenever you kill a player you gain a positive level of that effect, the max level of positive effect is two, it's opposite for the negative versions of the effects.
  
Whenever you die you gain a negative effect instead. The max level of the negative effect is 2, decreasing once per death.
  
Effects and their negative counterparts:
  
- **Strength**:
  - Positives Of Strength: Strength Effect.
  - Negatives Of Strength: Weakness Effect.
    
- **Speed**:
  - Positives Of Speed: Speed Effect:
  - Negatives Of Speed: Slowness Effects:
    
- **Hero Of The Village**:
  - Positives Of Hero Of The Village: Hero Of The Village Effect.
  - Negatives Of Hero Of The Village: Glowing Effect.
    
- **Haste**:
  - Positives Of Haste: Haste effect and Higher Attack Speed.
  - Negatives Of Haste: Mining Fatigue Effect.
    
- **Regeneration**:
  - Positives Of Regeneration: Regeneration Effect.
  - Negatives Of Regeneration: Poison Effect.
    
- **Jump Boost**:
  - Positives Of Jump Boost: Jump Boost Effect.
  - Negatives Of Jump Boost: Nausea Effect.

There are some more additions like if you die not to a player a bottle drops of a effect level for traps, I am so grateful for [Starshooter](https://modrinth.com/organization/starshooter) for making this plugin for Wrath SMP, Check out his other plugins like [Origins-Reborn](https://modrinth.com/plugin/origins-reborn).
